title: pimpinella magna subsp. dissecta
intro: Pimpinella magna subsp. dissecta, also known as dissected burnet, is a subspecies of burnet that belongs to the parsley family (Apiaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful for treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and wounds. The health benefits of Pimpinella magna subsp. dissecta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Pimpinella magna subsp. dissecta can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional cooking, particularly in soups and salads.
